home.title: Chisto.mk | Civic environmental platform
home.description: Report litter, illegal dumping, or dirty air where you live. Chisto.mk is a Macedonian app for real places and real follow-up.

about.title: About us | Chisto.mk
about.description: Civic app for litter and dirty air in Macedonia.

contact.title: Contact | Chisto.mk
contact.description: Questions, partnerships, or bug reports. Write to us; we read every message.

news.title: News | Chisto.mk
news.description: Product updates, field notes, and stories from the Chisto.mk team.

press.title: Press & media | Chisto.mk
press.description: Brand assets and a short boilerplate for journalists writing about Chisto.mk.

terms.title: Terms of use | Chisto.mk
terms.description: Terms governing use of the Chisto.mk website and mobile application.

privacy.title: Privacy policy | Chisto.mk
privacy.description: How Chisto.mk processes personal data under EU-aligned transparency standards.

cookies.title: Cookie policy | Chisto.mk
cookies.description: How Chisto.mk uses cookies and similar technologies, including analytics after consent.

data.title: Your data & account | Chisto.mk
data.description: How to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data and Chisto.mk account.

help.title: Help centre | Chisto.mk
help.description: Learn how to use Chisto.mk: get started, report pollution sites, and join cleanup events.

cookieConsent.bannerText: We use strictly necessary cookies to run this site. With your consent we also load anonymous usage analytics (Vercel Analytics) to improve the experience. You can change your choice anytime via Cookie settings in the footer.
cookieConsent.dialogIntro: Necessary cookies are always on. You can opt in to analytics below.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Helps us understand traffic and errors in aggregate (Vercel Analytics).
cookieConsent.necessaryNote: Strictly necessary cookies support security, your language choice, and this consent record.

hero.title: Live in a clean environment.
hero.subtitle: Environmental issues are easier to solve once they are on a map with a photo. Chisto.mk does that in public, across Macedonia.
hero.phoneDeckRegionLabel: App preview. Swipe horizontally or use the left and right arrow keys to change the screen.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: No workshop jargon. Install, report, show up.

steps.title: Get the app
steps.description: iOS or Android. Sign up with an email you actually check.

steps.title: Drop a pin
steps.description: Waste by the path? Smoky chimney? Put it on the map with a short note and a picture if you can.

steps.title: Join a cleanup
steps.description: When someone organises a pick-up or planting day nearby, you will see it in the app.

features.block1Title: What you see is where it happened
features.block2Body: Open reports stay visible so neighbours, journalists, and officials cannot pretend the mess was never there. When a group schedules work, you can join instead of only liking a post.

items.title: Pins, not walls of text
items.description: A map beats a comment thread when you need to find the same ditch or playground again.

items.title: Photos and dates
items.description: Rough category, timestamp, optional before/after. Enough for a volunteer group or a municipal desk to start from.

items.title: From report to broom
items.description: If there is a scheduled action, it lives next to the reports so people can show up with gloves, not just opinions.

items.title: What is Chisto.mk?
items.content: A mobile app and website from people in the region. You report environmental damage or mess, it stays public on a map, and you can hook into volunteer actions when they exist.

items.title: Is the app free?
items.content: Yes. Accounts and reports are free. We charge nothing at signup. If that ever changes, we will say so clearly.

items.title: Who sees my reports?
items.content: Reports are designed to be visible to the community and relevant actors so issues can be verified and addressed. You can read more in our privacy policy.

items.title: Can I report anonymously?
items.content: Account options and privacy settings depend on the version of the app you use. Check in-app settings or contact us for the latest options.

items.title: How do cleanup events work?
items.content: Organisers can publish actions in the app. You can browse nearby events, sign up where available, and see outcomes after the activity.

items.title: How can organisations partner with you?
items.content: Municipalities, NGOs, and companies can reach out via the contact form to explore data access, campaigns, or joint activities.

cta.title: Try the app
cta.subtitle: If you walk past the same rubbish every week, it costs nothing to document it once. Someone else might already be organising a pick-up.

footer.privacyNoticePrefix: We use this email only for Chisto.mk updates and handle it under our
footer.privacyNoticeSuffix: . You can ask us to remove it at any time.

contact.title: Write us
contact.successBody: We will get back to you shortly.
contact.submitError: We could not send your message. Please try again later or email us directly.
contact.privacyNoticePrefix: By sending this form, you agree that we process your contact details to reply under our

newsletter.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

phoneMockup.welcomeSubtitle: Pins from people in your area. Tap one to see the photo.

aboutPage.title: Chisto.mk is a civic app for litter and dirty air in Macedonia.
aboutPage.subtitle: You report waste, illegal dumping, or dirty air with a photo and a pin on the map. The same place stays visible for everyone.

newsPage.title: Updates from the team
newsPage.lead: Release notes, partnerships, and occasional write-ups when something worth sharing happens.
newsPage.demoNotice: These articles are sample content for the site. A managed news feed will replace them when our publishing tools go live.
newsPage.emptyBody: We are still wiring a simple feed here. Until then, follow our social channels or drop us a line if you have a story tip.
newsPage.contactCta: Suggest a story or ask a question

pressPage.title: Media resources
pressPage.lead: Journalists and partners can use the materials below. For anything else, send us an email. We answer serious inquiries.
pressPage.logoBody: SVG suitable for light backgrounds. Use clear space around the symbol; do not stretch or change colours.
pressPage.boilerplate: Chisto.mk is a civic environmental platform in Macedonia. People report litter, illegal dumping, and dirty air on a public map with photos and locations, and can join local cleanup actions when organisers post them in the app.

termsPage.title: Terms of use
termsPage.noticeTitle: Before you rely on these terms
termsPage.noticeBody: Complete all bracketed fields with verified legal and operational information before treating this text as final. App store privacy declarations should match this document and your published app. This is not legal advice and does not guarantee store approval. Consider review by qualified counsel in Macedonia (and, for EEA users, EU counsel) where appropriate.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.body:
These Terms of Use ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User," "you," or "your") and [LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME], a [ENTITY_TYPE] registered in the Republic of North Macedonia with registration number [REGISTRATION_NUMBER], registered office at [REGISTERED_ADDRESS] ("Chisto.mk," "we," "us," or "our").

By accessing or using the Chisto.mk mobile application and web platform (collectively, the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must immediately discontinue use of the Platform.

Effective date: [EFFECTIVE_DATE].

sections.title: 1. Definitions
sections.body:
1.1 "Account" means the user profile created to access certain features of the Platform.

1.2 "Content" means any text, images, photographs, videos, data, or other materials submitted, posted, or displayed on the Platform.

1.3 "Cleanup Event" means an organized environmental cleanup activity posted on the Platform.

1.4 "Report" means a user-submitted record about a mapped pollution site, including location data, narrative fields, and optional photographs.

1.5 "Services" means all functionalities provided through the Platform, including waste reporting, cleanup organization, map visualization, and community engagement features.

1.6 "User Content" means all Content submitted by users to the Platform.

sections.title: 2. Legal framework and applicability
sections.body:
2.1 These Terms are governed by:

Law on Obligations of the Republic of North Macedonia (Official Gazette No. 18/2001)
Law on Consumer Protection (Official Gazette No. 26/2023)
Law on Electronic Commerce (Official Gazette No. 39/2014)
Law on Personal Data Protection (Official Gazette No. 42/2020)
Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation)
Consumer Rights Directive 2011/83/EU

2.2 These Terms apply to all users accessing the Platform from any jurisdiction, with specific consumer protections applicable to users within the Republic of North Macedonia and the European Union.

sections.title: 3. Platform description and scope
sections.body:
3.1 Service overview

Chisto.mk is a civic environmental platform. Through our mobile apps (iOS and Android) and public website, users can:

View and interact with mapped pollution "sites" and user-submitted reports (including photos and locations)
Comment on sites, save or share them, and see cleanup events scheduled at a site
Create an account to submit reports, participate in the community, and receive optional notifications

We may also share aggregated or anonymised statistics with municipalities or partners where we describe in our Privacy Policy.

3.2 Platform role

Chisto.mk functions as a technology platform only. We do not:

Provide waste collection or environmental cleanup services ourselves
Guarantee that any authority will act on a report
Assume responsibility for third-party cleanup events or injuries at such events
Verify every user submission in real time (moderation may happen after publication)

3.3 No service guarantees

While we strive to keep the Platform available, we do not guarantee:

Uninterrupted or error-free operation
Municipal or institutional action based on submitted reports
Specific processing times
Compatibility with every device or operating system version

sections.title: 4. User eligibility and account registration
sections.body:
4.1 Age requirements

You must be at least 18 years old to create an Account. Users under 18 may view public content under parental supervision but may not register.

4.2 Account creation

To access account features in our mobile apps, you register with:

A valid email address
A mobile phone number you can verify with a one-time code (SMS or similar)
Your name and a password that meets our security rules
Optional profile information (for example a profile photo) where the product offers it

The public website may not offer full account registration; where it does not, account terms apply when you use the apps.

4.3 Account security

You are solely responsible for:

Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials
All activities occurring under your Account
Immediately notifying us of any unauthorized access

We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your Account unless due to our gross negligence.

4.4 Account accuracy

You represent and warrant that:

All registration information is accurate, current, and complete
You will maintain and update your information as necessary
You will not impersonate any person or entity
You will not create multiple accounts for improper purposes

sections.title: 5. User obligations and prohibited conduct
sections.body:
5.1 Permitted use

You may use the Platform solely for:

Reporting legitimate waste and pollution incidents
Organizing or participating in cleanup events
Viewing environmental data and maps
Engaging constructively with the community

5.2 Prohibited activities

You must not:

5.2.1 False reporting

Submit knowingly false, misleading, or inaccurate reports
Fabricate waste incidents or locations
Manipulate geolocation data

5.2.2 Harmful content

Upload content that is defamatory, obscene, threatening, or hateful
Post discriminatory content based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, or other protected characteristics
Share content that violates privacy rights of identifiable individuals
Include personal data of third parties without consent

5.2.3 Platform abuse

Use automated systems, bots, or scrapers to access the Platform
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to Platform systems
Interfere with or disrupt Platform functionality
Circumvent security measures or authentication mechanisms

5.2.4 Commercial misuse

Use the Platform for unauthorized commercial purposes
Post spam, advertising, or promotional content without permission
Collect user data for marketing purposes

5.2.5 Intellectual property violations

Upload content that infringes third-party copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property rights

5.3 Consequence of violations

We reserve the right to, without prior notice:

Remove violating content
Suspend or terminate your Account
Report illegal activities to competent authorities
Pursue legal remedies for damages

sections.title: 6. User content and intellectual property
sections.body:
6.1 User content ownership

You retain all ownership rights to your User Content. By submitting Content to the Platform, you grant Chisto.mk a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable license to:

Display, reproduce, and distribute your Content on the Platform
Use aggregated and anonymized data for statistical analysis and municipal reporting
Include your Content in promotional materials (with your consent)

6.2 User content representations

By submitting Content, you represent and warrant that:

You own or have necessary rights to the Content
Your Content does not infringe third-party rights
Your Content complies with applicable laws
You have obtained necessary consents for any identifiable individuals in photographs

6.3 Platform content ownership

All Platform software, design, text, graphics, logos, and other materials (excluding User Content) are owned by Chisto.mk or our licensors and are protected by:

Macedonian copyright law (Law on Copyright and Related Rights, Official Gazette No. 47/2023)
Macedonian trademark law (Law on Industrial Property, Official Gazette No. 21/2009)
International intellectual property treaties

6.4 Limited license to users

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Platform for personal, non-commercial purposes. This license does not permit:

Modification, distribution, or reproduction of Platform content
Reverse engineering or decompiling Platform software
Creating derivative works
Commercial exploitation without written permission

sections.title: 7. Privacy and data protection
sections.body:
7.1 Your use of the Platform is subject to our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.

7.2 We process personal data in accordance with:

Law on Personal Data Protection (Official Gazette No. 42/2020)
Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR)
Our Privacy Policy available at [PRIVACY_POLICY_URL]

7.3 Processing of your personal data is described in our Privacy Policy, including the legal bases in Section 4 of that Policy. Where we rely on consent, it applies only to the processing stated there and you may withdraw it as described in the Privacy Policy. Other processing may rely on contract, legitimate interests, legal obligation, or other bases permitted by law.

sections.title: 8. Consumer rights (EU and Macedonian users)
sections.body:
8.1 Digital services and price

The core civic map and reporting features are currently provided without charge. Where we do not ask you to pay for access, many consumer "distance contract" rules (including the 14-day right of withdrawal under Directive 2011/83/EU) often do not apply in the same way as for paid digital content. Nothing in this Section limits mandatory rights that still apply to you under Macedonian or EU law.

8.2 Information we provide

We aim to give clear information about:

Who operates the Platform (Section 17)
What the Service does (Section 3)
How to complain (Section 13)

8.3 Consumer disputes

Macedonian consumers may file complaints with:

Commission for Consumer Protection (Комисија за заштита на потрошувачите)
EU Online Dispute Resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

Contact us at [CONTACT_EMAIL] or [CONTACT_ADDRESS] for service issues before you escalate where reasonable.

sections.title: 9. Disclaimer of warranties
sections.body:
9.1 THE PLATFORM IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

MERCHANTABILITY
FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE
NON-INFRINGEMENT
ACCURACY, RELIABILITY, OR COMPLETENESS OF CONTENT
UNINTERRUPTED OR ERROR-FREE OPERATION

9.2 We do not warrant that:

The Platform will meet your specific requirements
User-submitted reports will result in municipal action
Platform data is current, accurate, or complete
Defects will be corrected
The Platform is free from viruses or harmful components

9.3 Some jurisdictions do not allow disclaimer of implied warranties. In such jurisdictions, the above disclaimers may not apply, and you may have additional rights.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of liability
sections.body:
10.1 General limitations

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW:

10.1.1 Chisto.mk shall not be liable for:

Indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages
Loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses
Damages arising from user reliance on Platform content
Damages resulting from third-party actions or content

10.1.2 Our total aggregate liability for all claims shall not exceed the greater of [AMOUNT] EUR and the fees you paid us for the Service in the 12 months preceding the claim. If you paid no fees in that period (for example because the Service is free), the cap is [AMOUNT] EUR.

10.2 Liability for mandatory legal obligations

Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability for:

Death or personal injury caused by gross negligence
Fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation
Violations of mandatory consumer protection rights
Other liability that cannot be excluded under Macedonian law

10.3 Third-party liability

We are not responsible for:

Actions or omissions of cleanup event organizers
Injuries or damages occurring during cleanup events
Municipal responses (or lack thereof) to reports
Third-party content, websites, or services linked from the Platform

sections.title: 11. Indemnification
sections.body:
11.1 To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, you agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Chisto.mk, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from:

Your violation of these Terms
Your violation of any laws or third-party rights
Your User Content
Your use of the Platform

11.2 We reserve the right to assume exclusive defense and control of any matter subject to indemnification, at your expense.

sections.title: 12. Modification and termination
sections.body:
12.1 Modification of Terms

12.1.1 We may modify these Terms at any time by posting updated Terms on the Platform.

12.1.2 We will provide at least 30 days' notice of material changes via:

Email notification to registered users
Prominent notice on the Platform
In-app notification

12.1.3 Continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes acceptance of modified Terms.

12.1.4 If you do not agree to modifications, you must discontinue use and may close your Account.

12.2 Platform modifications

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Platform (or any features) at any time without liability.

12.3 Termination by User

You may terminate your Account at any time through account settings in the apps where available, or by contacting [CONTACT_EMAIL].

12.4 Termination by Chisto.mk

We may suspend or terminate your Account immediately if:

You breach these Terms
Your conduct creates legal risk for us
We are required to do so by law
We cease operating the Platform

12.5 Effect of termination

Upon termination:

Your access rights immediately cease
We may delete your Account data (subject to legal retention obligations)
Sections 6, 10, 11, 14, and 16 survive termination

sections.title: 13. Dispute resolution and complaints
sections.body:
13.1 Complaint procedure

Before initiating formal proceedings, we encourage users to contact us at:

Email: [CONTACT_EMAIL]
Address: [CONTACT_ADDRESS]
Phone: [CONTACT_PHONE]

We will attempt to resolve complaints within 30 days of receipt.

13.2 Amicable settlement

We are committed to resolving disputes amicably and in good faith.

13.3 Mediation

If direct resolution fails, parties may pursue mediation through recognized mediation services in the Republic of North Macedonia.

13.4 Consumer ADR

EU consumers may use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

sections.title: 14. Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.body:
14.1 Governing law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of North Macedonia, without regard to conflict of law principles.

14.2 Jurisdiction

14.2.1 For disputes with consumers: competent courts in the Republic of North Macedonia as determined by mandatory consumer protection laws (generally, the consumer's place of residence).

14.2.2 For disputes with users who are not consumers (for example organisations using the Platform in a professional capacity): courts of [COURT_LOCATION], Republic of North Macedonia, have exclusive jurisdiction.

14.3 Mandatory consumer rights

Nothing in this Section limits mandatory consumer rights under EU or Macedonian law, including the right to bring proceedings in the consumer's country of residence.

sections.title: 15. Force majeure
sections.body:
Neither party shall be liable for failure to perform obligations due to circumstances beyond reasonable control, including:

Natural disasters, pandemics, or public health emergencies
War, terrorism, or civil unrest
Government actions or regulations
Internet or telecommunications failures
Cyberattacks or data breaches affecting third-party infrastructure

Performance obligations are suspended during force majeure events and resume when circumstances permit.

sections.title: 16. General provisions
sections.body:
16.1 Entire agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Chisto.mk.

16.2 Severability

If any provision is found invalid or unenforceable, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and remaining provisions remain in full effect.

16.3 No waiver

Failure to enforce any provision does not constitute a waiver of that provision or any other provision.

16.4 Assignment

You may not assign these Terms without our prior written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.

16.5 Language

These Terms are executed in Macedonian, English, and Albanian. In case of conflict, the Macedonian version prevails for users in Macedonia; the English version prevails for international disputes.

16.6 Relationship

Nothing in these Terms creates a partnership, joint venture, employment, or agency relationship.

16.7 Third-party rights

These Terms do not confer rights upon any third parties.

16.8 Notices

Legal notices must be sent to:

Email: [LEGAL_CONTACT_EMAIL]
Address: [REGISTERED_ADDRESS]

Notices to you may be sent to your registered email address.
